parameters.responseBody:
={
  "allowed": false,
  "reason": "duplicate_invite",
  "message": "{{ $json.invitee_email }} has already been invited to this team (status: {{ $json.existing_status }}).",
  "invitee_email": "{{ $json.invitee_email }}",
  "existing_status": "{{ $json.existing_status }}"
}

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "user_id": "{{ $json.owner_user_id }}",
  "email": "{{ $json.owner_email }}",
  "event_type": "team_member_invited",
  "metadata": {{ JSON.stringify({ invitee_email: $json.invitee_email, seat_role: $json.seat_role, seat_id: $json.seat_id, invite_token: $json.invite_token, email_sent: $json.email_sent }) }},
  "created_at": "{{ $json.now }}"
}
